data.summary: Insufficient evidence to validate the requirement for recipient contact and channel.
data.assessment: The exploratory step requires validation of the requirement 'Recipient contact + channel (email/SMS/link)', but there is no direct evidence provided that confirms this requirement is satisfied. While the linked use case mentions the need for recipient contact and channel, the prior steps do not include any checks or reads that confirm this information is being captured or validated. Therefore, the evidence is insufficient to assert a definitive conclusion regarding this requirement.
gaps: No evidence of recipient contact and channel validation.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify this requirement.
